title: Bridge Essay: Insight and the selection of ideas.
concept: Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

**Insight and the selection of ideas.** - Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2023). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2023.105363. PMID: 37598874. Perhaps it is no accident that insight moments accompany some of humanity's most important discoveries in science, medicine, and art. Here we propose that feelings of insight play a central role in (heuristically) selecting an idea from the stream of consciousness by capturing attention and eliciting a sense of intuitive confidence permitting fast action under uncertainty.
